title: the VEGAN mod
description: A small challenge mod to make you vegan.
body:
**the VEGAN mod by Cudsy is a challenge mod to create a interesting minecraft playthrough.**

![This is a gif showing how the mod works](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/880830252740390995/979113349600145508/output.gif?size=4096)

## Description
You are now VEGAN you may no longer attack anything you love everything and will do it no harm. You may no longer eat meat if you do you will explode. You must work out how you can kill the wither and enderdragon to defeat the final boss John Wick to claim the Vegan Burger good luck!

**To enable Vegan mode enable the gamerule veganMode by typing /gamerule veganMode true**

## Requirements
**GeckoLib v3 is Required** download it here https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib

Fabric API is Required
